title: Truth blocks — bigger code, more blocks, free melding
motto: Carve verified truth blocks from iron-plate twins. More blocks, bigger bytes — meld becomes free.

mega.label: bigger verified module — counts double toward free meld bytes

stack.label: field-wide stack — all chambers fused into one bigger truth block

levels.warming: blocks growing — compile gate still on
levels.ready: one more block or bytes unlocks free meld
levels.free: plate fuse without compile friction; BSP + sense pick up from meld

free_meld.statement: Bigger truth blocks and more of them → free plate melding without compile friction
